title: calchas scutellarioides var. limnophila
intro: Calchas scutellarioides var. limnophila, also known as the water lemongrass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Calchas scutellarioides var. limnophila include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and compounds such as limonene and beta-caryophyllene. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Calchas scutellarioides var. limnophila can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
